title: Crypto platforms rush to launch derivatives linked to SpaceX
message_html: Crypto platforms rush to launch derivatives linked to SpaceX ...
snippet: Binance among exchanges to offer so-called perpetual futures to speculate on price of rocket company’s upcoming IPO

title: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
message_html: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO ...
snippet: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.

title: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down
message_html: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down ...
snippet: Fantasy Top, a game that reimagines fantasy sports through the lens of Crypto Twitter, will close down two years after its hot launch.
